**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Beiyier Electronics Co., Ltd. is an extremely typical specimen of an 'electronic components proxy in a residential building,' mechanically mislabeled by the official system as a major heavy manufacturing plant. The forensic engine has forcefully cleansed the massive fake consumer electronics OEM system triggered by Apple Inc. at the underlying level. The official commercial system mindlessly categorized it into 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing' simply because the word 'Electronics' is in its name. However, the common-sense engine directly retrieved its baseline parameters: this is a super-old shop established in 2009, but its registered and paid-in capital is a pitiful '100,000' RMB, and the 2024 insured headcount is an extremely glaring '0 people.' The most fatal demotion strike comes from its geographical coordinates: 'Room 405, Unit 3, Building 01, Yingyuan Xinyu, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' 'Yingyuan Xinyu' is an extremely ordinary old residential community in Nanjing. In a 4th-floor residence of a residential building, employing 0 workers and using one hundred thousand RMB to set up a production line to 'manufacture electronic devices'? This not only violates physical common sense, but even the neighborhood committee aunties wouldn't let them get away with it. Reviewing its extremely brief business license: 'sales and repair of electronic products, electronic components, instrumentation, anti-static products.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; this is a pure Zero-Employee Electronic Components Trading Shell opened in a residential building. The owner (Guo Yongmei) highly likely registered this company using their own residential address purely to engage in the B2B proxy buying and selling of electronic components and to issue invoices.
